title: MATLAB: M-Files
summary: This page presents two graphical convolution snapshots, showing h(τ), x(t−τ), and their product for specific time instants. It also explains how MATLAB commands such as drawnow and pause can be used to animate or manually step through the convolution visualization.

figures.caption: Graphical convolution at step t = 0.75 second.
Graphical convolution at step t = 2.25 seconds.
